title: Croptastic
description: Tweaks crops to be less overpowered and more interesting to cultivate.
body:
Let's make farming less overpowered.

See the [change log](https://modrinth.com/mod/croptastic/changelog) for the full list of changes this mod makes. ### Gamerules All gamerules default to whatever their Vanilla equivalent would be, where possible. | Name | Default | Formula | | --------------------: | ------: | :----------------------------------------------- | | *cropGrowthLight* | 9 | *skyLight(thisBlock) ≥ 9* | | *cropGrowthFactor* | 25 | *random(0, cropGrowthFactor ÷ moisture + 1) = 0* | | *saplingGrowthLight* | 9 | *skyLight(aboveThisBlock) ≥ 9* | | *saplingGrowthFactor* | 7 | *random(0, saplingGrowthFactor) = 0* | ### Recommendations - Set the Vanilla gamerule *randomTickSpeed* to 1 to decrease the number of opportunities crops and saplings have to grow. Note that it also effects other things too, such as copper oxidation. - [Realistic Farmland](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-farmland). - [Hardcore Fluid Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-fluid-overhaul).
